steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to report overpayment of CAD 4,077.00 on BMO dividend for account 1401234567
Request refund citing incorrect withholding tax application - CA-NO treaty allows 15% rate, not the 13.5% applied
Provide documentation showing CLIENT01's Norwegian tax residency status to support treaty rate claim
Follow up with RBC's dividend reconciliation department within 5 business days if no acknowledgment received
